description_long: This rifle features a robust, industrial design with a combination of metallic and polymer components, giving it a rugged, utilitarian appearance. The body is primarily brown and yellow with camouflage-like patches, and it includes a large cylindrical drum magazine beneath the receiver, suggesting a high-capacity, possibly grenade-launcher or heavy projectile function. The stock is fixed and solid, with a pronounced pistol grip for ergonomic handling. The barrel is short and thick, with a metallic green finish and a capped muzzle, while the top of the receiver is equipped with a simple iron sight. Additional details include a side-mounted canister and mechanical elements, as well as visible fasteners and reinforced joints. The overall construction suggests durability and functionality for urban combat or tactical scenarios.
description: A rugged, industrial-style rifle with a fixed stock, drum magazine, and short, thick barrel, finished in brown, yellow, and green camouflage tones.
description_view_0: Front view showing the capped muzzle, cylindrical drum magazine, and side-mounted canister.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the fixed stock, pistol grip, large drum magazine, and iron sight on top.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the stock, grip, and the back of the drum magazine and canister.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the mechanical details, barrel, and additional fasteners.
